---
title: "Nam Pham"
image: avatar.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/nampham1106/
    - icon: twitter
      text: Twitter
      href: https://twitter.com
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/nampq11

---

Hi, I'm Nam Applied AI engineer.
